title: AnchorPrefixCodec: Structure-Constrained Token Space Reduction on Low-End Hardware (Exploratory, Proxy ~0.80 bpb)
author: assetmanagementchain

data.description: Structure-first codec with deterministic structure recovery before probabilistic fallback decoding.
Train-only candidate constraint on the first suffix piece to reduce the candidate continuation space.
Online scoring / score-first codec-space estimation used during evaluation.

novel_contributions: Deterministic structure recovery before fallback modeling
Train-only candidate constraint for the first suffix piece
Codec-space proxy evaluation rather than official eval_val
